channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: One of my favorite games of 2025 is finally coming to Xbox this summer — Dispatch
item.description: AdHoc Studios has announced that its superhero workplace comedy, Dispatch, is officially coming to Xbox this summer.

item.title: Hades 2, one of our top games of 2025, finally launches on PS5 and Xbox in April with new 'bonus content and quality-of-life improvements'
item.description: Supergiant Games has announced that its award-winning roguelike, Hades 2, will finally launch on PlayStation and Xbox next month.

item.title: Is this a whole new Microsoft? The fix Windows 11 campaign is already in high gear, and I'm loving that execs are seriously engaging with users
item.description: The big drive to fix Windows 11 is underway with regular, frank communication from execs — and it's clear that the taskbar is a top priority.

item.title: Android 17 va libérer toute la puissance de l’appareil photo de votre smartphone
item.description: Google a déployé la troisième bêta d'Android 17. Parmi les nouveautés, il y en a une qui est franchement intéressante : la possibilité d'utiliser toutes les fonctions de l'appareil photo dans les applications tierces.

item.title: This 4TB WD_Black SN7100 NVMe SSD deal is so good I had to check twice to make sure my eyes weren't playing tricks on me
item.description: Save $754 off the WD_Black SN7100 4TB NVMe SSD, a fast PCIe Gen4 drive that delivers read speeds up to 7,000MB/s and write speeds up to 6,700MB/s.

item.title: GAC choisit l’Autriche pour assembler l’Aion UT électrique, sa rivale de la Mégane E-Tech
item.description: Le constructeur chinois GAC arrive fort en Europe. Sa compacte électrique concurrente de la Renault Mégane E-Tech sera produite en Europe. De quoi réduire son prix, qui s'annonce particulièrement intéressant.

item.title: Five signs your infrastructure is stalling your AI strategy
item.description: Is your infrastructure stalling your AI strategy? Here are five critical signs.

item.title: Best External Hard Drive (2026): SSD to Store Data, Video, and More
item.description: Need an ultrafast drive for video editing or a rugged option to back up your photos in the field? We’ve got a solution for every situation.

item.title: What is the macOS Finder on your new MacBook Neo? Here’s your complete beginner’s guide on the Mac’s file organizer
item.description: Learn how to use the macOS Finder, from its simplest controls to its most advanced tools.

item.title: TikTok for Business accounts targeted in phishing campaign — here's how to stay safe
item.description: TikTok for Business users warned not to click any shady links, especially those recently registered through Nicenic.

item.title: Les développeurs de Pragmata copient l’IA pour créer des décors plus faux que nature
item.description: L’intelligence artificielle générative est connue pour ses distorsions de la réalité. Une singularité technologique qui a inspiré les développeurs du prochain titre inédit de Capcom.

item.title: La RTX 5060 Ti s’offre une belle ristourne sur Amazon juste avant la flambée des prix
item.description: Avec 8 Go de mémoire GDDR7 et un système de refroidissement à trois ventilateurs, la RTX 5060 Ti peut devenir un renfort de taille dans votre setup que ce soit pour jouer ou pour travailler sur des projets professionnels.

item.title: Beyond Paradise season 4 puts Humphrey and Martha's problems 'into sharp focus' — but stars promise 'something more solid' is ahead
item.description: Beyond Paradise season 4 kicks off with episode 1 dropping on March 27 — but are the new episodes a fresh start for Humphrey and Martha?

item.title: C-3PO’s Head From ‘Empire Strikes Back’ Sold for a Cool Million
item.description: The rare 'Star Wars' relic was the top-grossing item on the first day of Propstore's current auction.

item.title: One Way or Another, Most of Our Electricity Comes From Solar Power
item.description: That’s good news, since the forecast is sunshine for the next 5 billion years.

item.title: A New AI Documentary Puts CEOs in the Hot Seat—but Goes Too Easy on Them
item.description: The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist seeks the middle ground on a polarizing technology—and ends up letting tech execs like Sam Altman off the hook.

item.title: The cost of Netflix has just gone up in the US again — and it's 'only a matter of time' before the rest of us are hit with more price rises
item.description: Netflix's latest price increase only affects one nation so far, but we'll all be angrily canceling our subscriptions soon.

item.title: Plus épais, le Razr 70 Ultra corrigerait le plus gros défaut du Razr 60 Ultra de Motorola
item.description: Des rendus CAD du Razr 70 Ultra viennent de fuiter. Et contrairement à la tendance actuelle, ils révèlent un châssis plus généreux que celui du Razr 60 Ultra.

item.title: AMD dévoile son Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 : un monstrueux « double processeur » que les créateurs vont s’arracher
item.description: AMD a levé le voile sur son nouveau Ryzen 9 9950X3D2. Derrière ce nom compliqué, une nouvelle prouesse technique pour la firme. Cette puce grand public est en effet la première à embarquer à la fois de la mémoire 3D V-Cache et un double CCD. On vous explique.

item.title: What RAM crisis? — Save $178 on 64GB of super-fast Corsair Vengeance DDR5-5600 using this special code and nab a free gift too
item.description: Save $178 on 64GB of super-fast Corsair Vengeance DDR5-5600 using this code at Newegg.

item.title: T-Mobile 5G Home Internet Delivers Fast Speeds, Low Monthly Prices and Cash Back
item.description: Lower monthly prices and money-back offers are available for new subscribers to T-Mobile's three great 5G plans.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs TV de 2026 ? Notre sélection
item.description: Vous cherchez le meilleur téléviseur pour vos besoins ? Bienvenue sur notre guide d'achat des meilleurs TV, incluant des modèles de technologie OLED, QLED, LCD et même QD-OLED.

item.title: I'm a running watch expert — this is the best value Garmin watch around right now, and I've personally used it to run the London Marathon
item.description: The Garmin Epix Pro gets a better-than-half-price discount in Amazon's Spring Sale.

item.title: ‘This was never just about sex’ — ChatGPT’s ‘adult mode’ being shelved reveals a much bigger AI problem
item.description: OpenAI’s reported decision to shelve ChatGPT’s adult mode highlights the impossible tension between building AI that feels more human and keeping it totally clean, safe, and investor-friendly.

item.title: Insta360 Snap : un second écran MagSafe pour booster la qualité de vos photos sur Android et iPhone
item.description: La marque de caméras d'action Insta360 a dévoilé un nouvel accessoire pour smartphones. Baptisé Snap, il s'agit d'un écran supplémentaire à fixer au dos de votre téléphone.

item.title: Crise pétrolière : pourquoi le litre d’essence à 2 € est une aubaine pour les voitures électriques chinoises
item.description: Les voitures électriques chinoises pourraient être les grandes gagnantes du conflit actuel en Iran, qui fait flamber les prix de l'essence et du diesel à la pompe. On vous explique pourquoi.

item.title: 2,39 euros par mois : c’est le (petit) prix à payer pour protéger votre vie privée sur internet [Sponso]
item.description: Un VPN complet à deux euros par mois, c’est bien. Mais un écosystème entièrement dédié à la protection de vos données pour quelques centimes de plus, c’est encore mieux. C'est justement ce que propose Surfshark en ce moment.

item.title: I Asked ChatGPT 500 Questions. Here Are the Ads I Saw Most Often
item.description: Ads are rolling out across the US on ChatGPT’s free tier. I asked OpenAI's bot 500 questions to see what these ads were like and how they related to my prompts.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 and Galaxy S26+ Review: Lacking Ambition
item.description: Lack of fresh features and price increases make these two Samsung flagships feel rather bland.

item.title: How to Back Up Your iPhone to iCloud, MacOS, or Windows (2026)
item.description: Save your memories now, because if your iPhone gets stolen or lost, your photos and other precious files could be gone forever.

item.title: Why we need to rethink scale
item.description: In an increasingly digitized world, it may not be as important as it used to be. In 1966, Bruce Henderson, the founder of the Boston Consulting Group, articulated what would become one of the most influential ideas in the history of business strategy: the experience curve. Its origins date back to T. P. Wright’s original 1936 paper, “Factors Affecting the Cost of Airplanes.” Wright discovered a relationship between the cumulative production of a physical good and the costs associated with producing it. The breakthrough was that you could predict your future cost structure in a way competitors ...

item.title: How GM is shaping the future of car design, one Corvette at a time
item.description: Concept cars were once eye candy for car collectors. Today, they’re existential lifelines for an auto industry that’s in upheaval. I’m standing in a showroom at the new General Motors design headquarters outside of Detroit resisting the urge to reach out and touch something. In front of me, there’s a Corvette CX, a one-of-one experimental sports car that the automaker has meticulously handcrafted to look both silky smooth and fast as hell. As I crouch down to see just how low this low-riding car would drive, the roof of the Corvette CX lifts up in front of me and opens like the cockpit of a ...

item.title: How Delta turned TSA chaos into a brand advantage
item.description: Suspending VIP services for members of Congress is a good first step to separate Delta from its customers’ airport nightmares. As brand obsessions go, our collective love/hate relationship with airlines may be one of the most passionate and unique. It’s a perfect storm of time pressure, cost, emotional stakes, and a complete lack of control as a customer. ...

item.title: Drogues, alcool et grooming : Snapchat dans le viseur de l’UE pour sa politique envers les mineurs
item.description: Après TikTok en France, c’est au tour de Snapchat en Europe d’être accusée de nuire à la santé des plus jeunes. Bruxelles a annoncé ouvrir une enquête pour déterminer si la plateforme disposait de garde-fous suffisants pour protéger les mineurs.

item.title: Accident mortel d’une Model 3 : Tesla épingle un conducteur alcoolisé pour défendre l’Autopilot
item.description: Tesla passe à l'offensive dans un procès impliquant la Model 3 et son Autopilot. Alors que le pilotage automatique était accusé d'avoir provoqué un accident mortel, le constructeur a pu prouver que l'automobiliste est responsable. Les données de la voiture pointent en effet vers une vitesse excessive et un conducteur largement alcoolisé.

item.title: Apple Watch Series 12 : Mark Gurman douche les espoirs de ceux qui attendaient une révolution
item.description: Le journaliste Mark Gurman, spécialisé dans l'actualité d'Apple, se montre plutôt pessimiste sur les futures montres connectées d'Apple en termes de nouveautés aussi bien matérielles que logicielles.

item.title: Étanche et compacte, cette mini GoPro avec éclairage intégré chute sous les 160 €
item.description: La GoPro Hero d'entrée de gamme de 2024 a sa version améliorée : la GoPro Lit Hero, une action cam elle aussi toute petite, mais équipée d'un éclairage LED en façade bien pratique. Actuellement, ce modèle est proposé à 159,99 euros au lieu de 269,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Physical AI: The Next Great Manufacturing Shift
item.description: Physical AI, visual tools and wireless automation are converging to transform factory performance and workforce appeal.

item.title: How Im streaming for less in 2026: Score Spring Sale streaming deals on Paramount+, Spotify, Dropout TV, and more
item.description: The best Big Spring Sale streaming deals include free offers on Spotify and Amazon Music Unlimited, plus $22 off Paramount+.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for March 27, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: On a testé le nouveau système de fixation de sacoches vélo Thule, est-ce aussi pratique qu’en théorie ?
item.description: Nous avons manipulé l’inédite solution Thule InLock, présentée pour la première fois au public lors du CyclingWorld 2026, et qui veut faciliter la fixation de sacoches vélo et les rendre plus légères.

item.title: Xpeng améliore sa rivale de la Tesla Model 3 à moins de 20 000 € : plus d’autonomie, dans tous les sens du terme
item.description: Le constructeur chinois Xpeng lève le voile sur la nouvelle version de sa Mona M03. La berline électrique augmente son autonomie et s’offre une toute nouvelle puce afin d’améliorer sa conduite autonome. Le tout pour un prix très contenu.

item.title: Coup de tonnerre sur la PS5 : des tarifs qui pourraient grimper jusqu’à 900 €
item.description: La PS5 et la PS5 Pro pourraient voir leurs prix augmenter de 100 euros en Europe, atteignant respectivement 649,99 et 899,99 euros. Cette hausse serait due à l'augmentation des coûts des composants, notamment la RAM, exacerbée par la demande croissante liée à l'IA. Sony a déjà procédé à des augmentations de prix par le passé, et la situation actuelle du marché pourrait justifier cette nouvelle hausse....

item.title: At Gaza’s Al-Shifa Hospital, the War Isn’t Over
item.description: Months into a supposed ceasefire in Gaza, doctors still have to smuggle in basic medical supplies—and treat new casualties of war.

item.title: Rank the 50 best Apple products
item.description: In honor of Apple’s 50th anniversary, we picked 50 of our favorite Apple products, from the OG iPhone to GarageBand. Now we’re ranking them as a community, and you can contribute here.

item.title: Here’s how to rank the 50 best Apple products ever
item.description: Apple turns 50 next week, and we're going to spend the week covering the company, its products, its legacy, and its future. But mostly, we're going to spend the week debating which Apple products are the best. And we need your help. Our ranking system is live now, filled with what we believe to be […]

item.title: How to watch E3 Saxo Bank Classic 2026: Live stream cycling online from anywhere for FREE
item.description: All the ways to watch E3 Saxo Bank Classic 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, including for FREE, as Mathieu van der Poel goes for three in a row.

item.title: Scientists have designed a way to save our brains from fake AI videos
item.description: ETH Zurich engineers have designed a new chip that can shield visual reality from the manipulation of generative AI. Now we only have to implement it. Visual truth is going down in flames, thanks to new generative AI models that produce synthetic media that looks indistinguishable from reality. But a team of university researchers has figured out a hardware fix that just might save us. Engineers at ETH Zurich have designed a working prototype of a camera that physically stamps a cryptographic seal of authenticity onto every photo or video right at the image sensor (electronic chip) that captur...

item.title: Why Meta is building its high-tech South Carolina data center with an old-school material
item.description: Mass timber is one way to offset the environmental downsides of a data center, but it could also be a way to build them faster. In a greenfield industrial park in rural Aiken County, South Carolina, Meta is building a new $800 million data center that’s much like any of the other hyperscale data centers giant tech companies are scrambling to construct. Set on 300 acres with two massive data halls making up most of its 715,000 square feet of buildings, it’s the kind of gargantuan facility that has become the de facto built form of the race to harness the lucrative power of artificial intelligen...

item.title: No Kings protest: March 28 rally goes far beyond America—it will be on 6 continents. Here’s who will be there
item.description: Millions are expected to turn out on Saturday to oppose Trump and support democracy, including headliners Bruce Springsteen and Senator Bernie Sanders. There are more than 3,100 events scheduled in all 50 states for tomorrow’s third “No Kings” nationwide protest. Musicians Bruce Springsteen and Joan Baez, actress Jane Fonda, and Senator Bernie Sanders of Vermont are among those slated to speak and/or perform at one of the events on March 28, in Minnesota’s capital city, St. Paul....

item.title: The Navy’s AI bet to fix its submarine bottleneck
item.description: A $2.4 billion automated factory aims to speed production. The harder question is whether the U.S. can still fix what it builds. The answer to America’s submarine bottleneck, the U.S. Navy has decided, lies as much in software as it does in steel. A new multibillion-dollar facility in Cherokee, Alabama, aims to harness AI and robotics to build submarine components faster and more reliably....

item.title: Social Security change capping benefits payments at $50,000 a year: Experts’ solution to the SSA going broke in 7 years
item.description: The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget has a new proposal to save the system from insolvency—but is it worth it? Here’s what you need to know. With Social Security on track to go broke in less than seven years, a new report from the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget (CRFB) is proposing a solution: Cap Social Security payouts to $100,000 a year for couples, as part of an overall plan to save it from insolvency. (That’s $50,000 for a single retiree.)...

item.title: Lloyds admits nearly half a million banking customers affected by account glitch exposing transaction data
item.description: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland customers may remember that weird app glitch – now we know a lot more.

item.title: Need a new TV? The TCL 98-inch Class QM8K Series is over $1,000 off in Amazons Big Spring Sale.
item.description: Get the best TV deal in Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Save 25% on the TCL 98-inch Class QM8K Series.

item.title: Creators obsess over the DJI Osmo Pocket 3 vlogging camera, and its finally on sale
item.description: The Mashable-tested DJI Osmo Pocket 3 vlogging camera is down to $439 on Amazon, an all-time low price as of March 2026.

item.title: The best deals this week, according to Mashables team of shopping experts
item.description: The best deals this week. Mashable's shoping team finds deals on AirPods, Pokémon cards, robot vacuums, and so much more.

item.title: Ive tested dozens of portable power stations — heres what Id buy during Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Portable power stations from Bluetti, Anker Solix, Jackery, and more are over 50% off during the Amazon Big Spring Sale.
